citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection at 1:12 p.m. on 14 MAY 2026.
The inspector attempted to contact the licensee and was able to reach him by phone. The licensee stated that he was in
travel status with the animals and would not return until sometime in August; an itinerary had not been submitted prior to
travel. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and its
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is a serious concern and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection at 1:12 p.m. on 14 MAY 2026. 
The inspector attempted to contact the licensee and was able to reach him by phone. The licensee stated that he was in 
travel status with the animals and would not return until sometime in August; an itinerary had not been submitted prior to 
travel. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and its 
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is a serious concern and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
